definition.name: hashing_bound
definition.definition: H_2 := g_{s,s} - g_{s,e} is the 2-Rényi Hashing bound. For Pauli channels N(ρ) = p_0·1 + p_1·XρX + p_2·YρY + p_3·ZρZ, H_2 = -log_2(p_0^2+p_1^2+p_2^2+p_3^2). The error-correction condition is H_2 ≤ 1-r. [Ref: Eq.(31-32) of Sauliere2026, lines 432-438]
